headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Falls As Oil Prices Rise, Trump Extends Ceasefire; These Gold Miners Fall (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes weakened in the final minutes of trading Tuesday as President Donald Trump extended the ceasefire with Iran.  Meanwhile, Northern Trust sprinted higher as gold names slid on the stock market today.  The ceasefire was set to expire on Wednesday, but Trump stretched the halt to an undefined time saying Tehran's government was "seriously fractured."

headline: Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS) Surprises With Strong Q1 CY2026
summary: Financial services company Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 13.8% year on year to $2.21 billion. Its GAAP profit of $2.71 per share was 16.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Northern Trust Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: CHICAGO, April 21, 2026--Northern Trust Corporation has released its first quarter 2026 financial results. Results can be found at https://www.northerntrust.com/about-us/investor-relations as well as on the corporation's Current Report on Form 8-K filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on April 21, 2026, which is available on the SEC's website at https://www.sec.gov.
